no_changes_rationale:

reason: The bead-scoped fix is in place and `go test ./internal/config/...` passes, but the required repo-wide gate `cd cli && go test ./...` is still red on unrelated pre-existing failures in `cmd` and `internal/agent` (installation acceptance tests expect `cli/build/ddx`, and `internal/agent/session_log_format_test.go` has output-matching failures). next:
